kirundi.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Subira ku rutonde rw'ibikoresho vya STEM Lab
kirundi.your_pitch_over_time_mapped_to_musical: Ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe mu gihe, bwashizwe ku noti z'umuziki. Icatsi = nyaco, umuhondo = hafi, umutuku = ijwi ridahuye.
kirundi.click_a_note_to_hear_the_tone_try_to_m: Fyonda noti kugira ngo wumve ijwi. Gerageza kuryifatanya n'ijwi ryawe!
kirundi.this_will_guide_you_through_finding_yo: Ibi bizakuyobora mu kurondera noti zawe zoroheye zo hasi cane n'izo hejuru cane. Menya neza ko mikorofoni ikora.
kirundi.cancel_vocal_range_test_low_range: Kuraho ikizamini c'urwego rw'ijwi (urwego rwo hasi)
kirundi.now_sing_your_highest_comfortable_note: None ririmba noti yawe yo hejuru cane yoroheye
kirundi.cancel_vocal_range_test_high_range: Kuraho ikizamini c'urwego rw'ijwi (urwego rwo hejuru)
kirundi.estimated_from_your_lowest_note_true_v: Vyakekejwe hakoreshejwe noti yawe yo hasi cane — ubwoko nyabwo bw'ijwi bushingiye kandi ku rwego ruboroheye (tessitura) n'ibara ry'ijwi, atari ku rwego gusa.
kirundi.very_little_pitch_variation_good_for_c: Impinduka nke cane z'ubuhagarike. Vyiza ku ivange ry'itsinda ry'abaririmvyi!
kirundi.vibrato_rate_is_above_8_hz_try_to_rela: Igipimo ca vibrato kiri hejuru ya 8 Hz. Gerageza kuruhuka no kugabanya umuvuduko.
kirundi.vibrato_rate_is_below_4_hz_try_to_ener: Igipimo ca vibrato kiri hasi ya 4 Hz. Gerageza guha imbaraga umuyaga wawe.
kirundi.beautiful_rate_and_depth_are_in_the_id: Vyiza! Igipimo n'ubujakuzimu biri mu rwego rwiza cane.
kirundi.getting_there_aim_for_5_7_hz_rate_and_: Hafi kugera! Genza igipimo ca 5-7 Hz n'ubujakuzimu bwa 30-80 cents.
kirundi.sustain_a_note_with_no_vibrato_practic: Fata noti nta vibrato. Itoze kugenzura ijwi ryawe kugira ngo ribandanye kuba rihamye rwose.
kirundi.try_to_vibrate_at_exactly_6_hz_6_oscil: Gerageza kunyeganyega neza kuri 6 Hz (kunyeganyega 6 mu isegonda). Raba isomo ry'igipimo.
kirundi.try_to_keep_vibrato_depth_around_50_ce: Gerageza kubika ubujakuzimu bwa vibrato hafi ya 50 cents. Ntabwo bigari cane, ntabwo bito cane.
kirundi.sustain_a_note_to_see_your_vibrato_pat: Fata noti kugira ngo urabe uburyo bwa vibrato yawe. Umurongo wo hagati ni ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe bw'impuzandengo.
kirundi.vibrato_waveform_trace_showing_pitch_d: Ikimenyetso c'ishusho y'umuraba wa vibrato cerekana ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike mu gihe
kirundi.staff_notation_showing_reference_targe: Inyandiko y'umurongo w'umuziki yerekana icitegererezo, intego, na noti yawe iriho ubu
kirundi.explore_how_your_body_makes_sound_clic: Rondera uburyo umubiri wawe ukora amajwi. Fyonda akarere kugira ngo wige kuri ako, canke gukoresha animasiyo kugira ngo urabe uko gikora.
kirundi.sagittal_cross_section_diagram_of_the_: Igishushanyo c'igice ca sagittal c'inzira y'ijwi ry'umuntu. Koresha buto z'utwambi tw'ibumoso/iburyo kugira ngo unyure ku turere, Enter canke Space kugira ngo utoranye.
kirundi.understanding_these_conditions_helps_y: Gutahura izi mimerere bigufasha kumenya ibimenyetso vy'iburira hakiri kare. Nimba ufite ibimenyetso bikomeje, ja kwa muganga.
kirundi.this_information_is_educational_only_i: 👨‍⚕️ Aya makuru ni ay'uburezi gusa. Si impanuro y'ubuvuzi. Nimba uhangayikishijwe n'ijwi ryawe, ja kwa muganga w'amatwi-izuru-umuhogo canke umuhanga mu kuvuga.
kirundi.get_personalized_vocal_health_tips_app: Bona impanuro z'ubuzima bw'ijwi zihariye zihuye n'urwego rwawe rw'ishure.
kirundi.shoulders_relaxed_and_rolled_back_not_: Ibitugu vyoroheye kandi bizingiye inyuma (atari vyunamye)
kirundi.read_the_notes_on_the_staff_and_sing_t: Soma noti ku murongo w'umuziki uzirimbe ukurikije. Kumenya ubuhagarike bw'ijwi mu gihe nyaco bigenzura ukuri kwawe.
kirundi.sing_into_the_mic_the_lab_tracks_frequ: Ririmba muri mikorofoni; laboratwari ikurikirana frecwensi mu gihe nyaco. Abaririmvyi batojwe babika ubuhagarike mu ±5 cents (1/20 vy'ijwi rya hagati) — uku ni ko ubuhagarike bwuzuye bwumvikana.
kirundi.most_untrained_voices_span_1_5_2_octav: Amajwi menshi atatojwe akwira octave 1.5-2; abaririmvyi ba kera batojwe bagera kuri 3 canke hejuru. Kwagura urwego ahanini ni ukuvanga ba-rejistre, atari gukururira hejuru na hasi gusa.
kirundi.healthy_vibrato_5_7_hz_oscillation_60_: Vibrato nzima: kunyeganyega kwa 5-7 Hz, kufite ubugari bwa ~60-100 cents. Buhoro cane = kunyeganyega; vyihuta cane = guhinda. Vibrato ni umurimo w'inkunga y'umwuka yoroheye, atari ubuhanga bwihariye.
kirundi.major_3rd_vs_minor_3rd_is_the_single_m: Uwa gatatu munini na uwa gatatu muto ni ababiri b'intera bahangayikishije cane abatangira. Ibimenyetso vyo kwibuka: uwa gatatu munini = "Oh when the saints", uwa gatatu muto = "Greensleeves". Bubaka ukumva bijanye.
kirundi.lip_trills_sirens_before_any_sustained: Kunyeganyega kw'iminwa + siyereni mbere yo kuririmba kose kuramvye. Iminota 5-10 yo gushusha ku mbaraga nke igabanya ivyago vyo gukoresha imigozi y'ijwi cane ku kigero c'igice. Gusimbuka gushusha ni impamvu ya nimero 1 y'ibikomere vy'ijwi bishobora kwirindwa.
kirundi.solf_ge_do_re_mi_letter_names_for_sigh: Solfège (do-re-mi) iruta amazina y'inyuguti mu gusoma inyandiko kuko uduce tw'amagambo dushira mu kode isano y'intera, atari ibimenyetso vy'ubuhagarike gusa. Do igenda iruta do ihamye ku muziki w'amajwi.
kirundi.resonance_lab_discover_your_vocal_tone: Laboratwari y'Isubiramwo ry'Amajwi — Menya Ibara ry'Ijwi Ryawe
kirundi.two_sliders_throat_openness_and_soft_p: Ba-slider babiri — kwugurura umuhogo no kuzamura ijuru ry'akanwa ryoroshe — bahurira mu bwiza bune bw'ibara ry'ijwi (bukungahaye, bwaka, bushushe, bw'izuru). Nta manota, nta gushira ahagaragara: gerageza, andika, kandi usobanure ivyo umenya.
kirundi.operatic_professional_tone_full_resona: Ibara ry'ijwi rya opera / ry'umwuga. Isubiramwo ryuzuye.
kirundi.forward_placement_pop_belt_style: Gushira imbere. Uburyo bwa pop / belting.
kirundi.sliders_for_throat_openness_soft_palat: Ba-slider bo kwugurura umuhogo, kuzamura ijuru ry'akanwa ryoroshe. Gutandukanya bihariye n'amabara 4 y'ijwi. Nta manota, nta gushira ahagaragara.
kirundi.hypothesis_what_anatomical_adjustments: Iciyumviro: Ni izihe mpinduka z'imiterere y'umubiri zitanga ibara ry'ijwi bukungahaye?
kirundi.why_do_classical_singers_lift_the_pala: Kuki abaririmvyi ba kera bazamura ijuru ry'akanwa?
kirundi.how_does_throat_openness_affect_overto: Kwugurura umuhogo bigira ingaruka ki ku rukurikirane rw'amajwi yo hejuru?
kirundi.explain_how_resonance_cavity_shape_con: Sigura uko imiterere y'umwobo w'isubiramwo igenzura ibara ry'ijwi.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_tone_marker_no_: Icitonderwa c'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cihariye c'amabara 4 y'ijwi; nta manota ya akustike; nta gushira ahagaragara — ku bushake.
